practices: Use clear, scannable typography with generous line spacing.
Highly visible primary CTA (Voice Recording Button).

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Containers: p-6. Screen edge padding: px-6. List items gap: gap-4.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and badges.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] for subtle elevation, shadow-none for flat elements.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4A6B53] text-white rounded-full font-medium py-4 px-6 flex-row items-center justify-center
buttons.voice_fab: Absolute bottom-8 self-center w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#D48C70] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(212,140,112,0.4)] flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E3EAE4] text-[#4A6B53] rounded-full font-medium py-4 px-6 flex-row items-center justify-center

cards.task_card: bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl border border-[#E8EBE8] mb-4 shadow-sm
cards.stats_card: bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl flex-1 items-center justify-center shadow-sm

badges.priority_high: bg-[#FBEAEB] text-[#D35F5F] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold overflow-hidden
badges.status_pending: bg-[#F9EDDF] text-[#C7823B] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold overflow-hidden
badges.status_done: bg-[#DDF0E6] text-[#3E7D5F] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold overflow-hidden

inputs.text: bg-[#F9F9F6] border border-[#E8EBE8] rounded-xl px-4 py-4 text-base text-[#2D372E]
inputs.dropdown: bg-white border border-[#E8EBE8] rounded-xl px-4 py-3

motion_and_interactions.voice_recording: Pulsating ring around the FAB while active (scale 1.0 to 1.2, opacity 0.5 to 0).
motion_and_interactions.task_complete: Satisfying bounce/scale-up on the checkbox, followed by fade out or strikethrough.

empty_state_illustration.description: Potted plant on a white background, representing 'All caught up' or empty state. Very calm and relaxing.

workspace_background.description: Minimalist calm workspace. Use sparingly as a top header background for dashboard or stats view.

instructions_to_main_agent.styling: Use NativeWind (Tailwind CSS for React Native) or StyleSheet. The provided classes map directly to NativeWind.
layout_patterns: Wrap main screens in SafeAreaView to prevent notch collisions.
Use KeyboardAvoidingView for screens with text inputs.
Ensure bottom tab navigator or bottom sheet leaves space for the Voice FAB.
Do NOT use HTML elements (div, span). Use View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, TextInput.
Use explicit activeOpacity on all interactive elements (buttons, task items).
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must include a testID attribute (e.g., testID='voice-record-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility_props: Use accessible={true}, accessibilityLabel, and accessibilityRole on all interactive elements to support screen readers, crucial for non-native speakers and ADHD users.
instructions_to_main_agent.javascript_note: You have .js files not .tsx files, ensure you are writing valid modern Javascript.
